scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check server.mjs && node --check api/chat.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-web.mjs
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init CouplesOS com.couplesos.app --web-dir www
scripts.cap:ios: npm run prepare:web && npx cap add ios && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run prepare:web && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync
